description: k6 load testing dashboard with KPI cards, throughput, latency, and endpoint drill-down.

panels.description: min/max/p95/p99 depends on the available Quantile Stats

targets.expr: avg by(endpoint, method, status) (k6_http_req_duration_min{run_id=~"$run_id", scenario=~"$scenario", endpoint=~"$endpoint"})
avg by(endpoint, method, status) (k6_http_req_duration_max{run_id=~"$run_id", scenario=~"$scenario", endpoint=~"$endpoint"})
avg by(endpoint, method, status) (k6_http_req_duration_p95{run_id=~"$run_id", scenario=~"$scenario", endpoint=~"$endpoint"})
avg by(endpoint, method, status) (k6_http_req_duration_p99{run_id=~"$run_id", scenario=~"$scenario", endpoint=~"$endpoint"})

list.description: Filter by individual test run id. Leave All to compare all recorded runs.

list.description: Filter by endpoint label for HTTP metrics. Leave All for scenario-wide views.
list.label: Endpoint

list.label: Trend Metrics Query
list.name: quantile_stat

list.description: Adhoc filters are applied to all panels. To enable it, go to Dashboard Settings / Variables / adhoc_filter and select the target Prometheus data source.
